message:
feat(demo_showcase): Add --headless-dump-json for snapshot testing

Add JSON output mode for headless smoke tests to enable regression
snapshot testing with insta:
- New --headless-dump-json flag outputs structured JSON instead of plain text
- JSON includes config summary, headless size, layout mode
- Per-frame stats with dirty cell counts and delta time
- Sentinel markers (top bar text, section name) for content verification
- FrameStats struct and extract_buffer_row helper for content extraction

This enables bd-2649 (snapshot regression suite).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
